campaign.title: Abu Dhabi Bitcoin Mining Infrastructure
campaign.description: Digital infrastructure opportunity in Bitcoin mining with $0.0125/kWh power economics
campaign.message:
Hi WMW team

We are opening a limited number of confidential conversations around an Abu Dhabi digital infrastructure opportunity in Bitcoin mining with strong structural power economics at $0.0125/kWh. The opportunity is infrastructure-led, execution-ready, and intended for a serious private-capital audience. Would you be open to a brief introduction?

Regards Jonas Freiwald

phase1.title: Tier 1 Sovereign Wealth Funds
phase1.rationale: Largest capital pools; infrastructure mandates align; most active deployers
phase1.expectedEngagement: High - These are most active institutional investors

phase2.title: Global Infrastructure Funds
phase2.rationale: Dedicated infrastructure expertise; active in data center/energy deals
phase2.expectedEngagement: High - Align with existing portfolio focus

phase3.title: Crypto/Bitcoin Specialists & New PE Funds
phase3.rationale: Cryptocurrency expertise; understanding of Bitcoin mining economics; large dry powder
phase3.expectedEngagement: Very High - Direct alignment with opportunity

phase4.title: Family Offices & Specialized Crypto VCs
phase4.rationale: Crypto market expertise; emerging VC capacity; family office networks

phase5.title: Strategic Corporates & Infrastructure Players
phase5.rationale: Energy infrastructure alignment; potential strategic partnerships
phase5.expectedEngagement: Medium - Strategic but slower decision cycles

marketOpportunity.uaeLeadership: UAE generating 13 EH/s Bitcoin hashrate (3.7% of global); fastest-growing mining hub
marketOpportunity.cryptoGrowth: UAE received $34B in crypto inflows (July 2023-June 2024); 42% YoY growth
marketOpportunity.regulatoryAdvantage: Abu Dhabi Global Market and Dubai Multi Commodities Centre supporting crypto; no personal income tax
marketOpportunity.infrastructureMarket: GCC infrastructure market valued at $234.8B (2024), expected to reach $386.7B by 2033
marketOpportunity.dealVolume: GCC deal value reached $72.7B across 554 transactions in 2025 (170% increase vs 2024)

competitiveAdvantages.costStructure: $0.0125/kWh power cost is extremely competitive for Bitcoin mining
competitiveAdvantages.geopoliticalStability: GCC region perceived as low-risk with stable governance
competitiveAdvantages.technicalSupport: Strong existing digital infrastructure, data centers, and technical expertise
competitiveAdvantages.capitalAvailability: Abundant capital in region; SWFs actively deploying $36B+ annually
